meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Vida
products.tagline: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask
products.summaryZh: 克隆你自己。在你开口之前，让AI替你完成工作。
products.descriptionZh: Vida 是一款能学习你工作方式、记住重要事项、并随时间推移越来越像你的人工智能。你使用Vida越多，它就越了解你的习惯、项目以及你完成事情的方式。最终，它会像你的另一个版本——在你开口之前，就默默在后台处理重复性工作。今天，我们推出首批5个SOTA应用场景：回复救援·提示词救援·简历救援·工作区清理·每日总结。还有95个场景等待公开攻克。
products.description: Vida is an AI that learns how you work, remembers what matters, and becomes more like you over time. The more you use Vida, the more it understands your habits, your projects, and your way of getting things done. Eventually, it works like a second version of you—quietly handling repetitive work in the background before you even ask. Today, we’re launching our first 5 SOTA use cases: Reply Rescue · Prompt Rescue · Resume Rescue · Workspace Cleanup · Daily Wrap 95 more to conquer in public.

products.name: ChecklistFox
products.tagline: AI checklist maker for beautiful pdfs, free & instant
products.summaryZh: AI清单制作工具，生成精美PDF，免费且即时
products.descriptionZh: 输入提示，即可获得精美计划表。选择契合你心意的主题，然后下载为PDF。专为婚礼、朝觐、新生儿、搬家等各类人生大事而设计。
products.description: Type a prompt, get a beautiful planner. Choose a theme that feels like you, then download as a PDF. Built for weddings, hajj, new babies, big moves, and everything in between.

products.name: PhoneDeck
products.tagline: Turn your iPhone into a free Mac controller
products.summaryZh: 将你的iPhone变成免费的Mac控制器
products.descriptionZh: 你已经有了一台StreamDeck。它就是你的iPhone。PhoneDeck将你的iPhone变成一个完全可自定义的Mac控制器，媒体控制、应用启动器、自定义按钮，全部呈现在手机屏幕上。无需硬件，无需订阅，完全免费。由一位独立开发者用7天时间开发，因为我自己也需要它。开箱即用，无需繁琐设置。立即下载：Phonedeck.io
products.description: You already own a StreamDeck. It's your iPhone. PhoneDeck turns your iPhone into a fully customizable Mac controller, media controls, app launcher, custom buttons, all on your phone's screen. No hardware. No subscription. Free. Built by a solo developer in 7 days because I needed it myself. Works out of the box. No setup headaches. Download Now: Phonedeck.io

products.name: CentryAI
products.tagline: Subscription tracker built by someone who forgot 11 of them
products.summaryZh: 由一位忘记11个订阅的人打造的订阅追踪工具
products.descriptionZh: 我开发CentryAI，是因为自己有ADHD，却为11个几个月没用的订阅服务付着钱。大多数追踪工具需要手动输入所有信息——但如果你连自己在付什么钱都忘了，这根本行不通。CentryAI能扫描你的Gmail或iCloud，找出所有定期扣费项目，并评估哪些是你没在用的。真正的痛点在于取消订阅。CentryAI的取消查找功能只需一次点击，就能定位到确切的取消页面。无需关联银行账户。邮件不会被存储。支持18种语言。
products.description: I built CentryAI because I have ADHD and was paying for 11 subscriptions I hadn't used in months. Most trackers make you enter everything manually — that doesn't work if you've forgotten what you're paying for. CentryAI scans your Gmail or iCloud, finds every recurring charge, and scores which ones you're not using. The real pain is cancelling. CentryAI's Cancel Finder locates the exact cancellation page in one tap. No bank linking. Emails are never stored. Available in 18 languages.

products.name: Termi Protocol
products.tagline: Watch your AI coding agents build, live in 3D
products.summaryZh: 观看你的AI编程代理在3D环境中实时构建。
products.descriptionZh: Termi Protocol 是AI智能体工作流的3D模拟。为你的编程智能体赋予面孔、办公桌和客厅。像玩游戏一样，实时观看它们在3D空间中读取、编写和执行命令。你运行智能体，我们可视化流程。
products.description: The Termi Protocol is a 3D simulation of AI agent workflows. Give your coding agents a face, a desk and a living room. Watch them read, write and run commands live in 3D, like a game. You run the agents; we visualize the process.

products.name: ShotLab
products.tagline: Turn boring screenshots into scroll-stopping content!
products.summaryZh: 把枯燥的截图变成让人忍不住停下滑动的精彩内容！
products.descriptionZh: 使用简易编辑器，为截图添加精美背景、真实感相框、贴纸、标注等元素。打造吸睛视觉效果，提升关注度与互动率，让您的帖子、产品及内容瞬间脱颖而出。
products.description: Add beautiful backgrounds, realistic frames, stickers, annotations, and more to your screenshots with an easy to use editor. Create eye-catching visuals that grab attention, boost engagement, and make your posts, products, and content stand out instantly.

products.name: Qik Office
products.tagline: AI Office that deploys AI managers across agentic rooms
products.summaryZh: AI Office 在智能体房间中部署 AI 管理者
products.descriptionZh: 构建你的首个AI办公室，可部署无限数量的AI项目经理与AI助手。这些智能体在名为“智能体空间”的共享环境中与人类协作，协助撰写AI会议纪要、执行指令、开展调研、安排会议、自动分配任务、设置提醒、规划新项目及执行特定指派任务。AI Office为个人、小型团队、初创企业及大型企业带来双倍生产力提升。产品猎人可免费使用，并额外获赠智能体积分。
products.description: Build your first AI Office that deploys unlimited AI project managers and AI assistants. These agents work with humans in shared environments called Agentic Rooms and help to write AI minutes, execute commands, do research, schedule meetings, auto-assign tasks, set reminders, plan new projects & execute specific assigned tasks. AI Office delivers 2x productivity for individuals, small teams, startups and enterprises. It is completely free with extra agent credits for product hunters.

products.name: List Detective: Free Email List Checker
products.tagline: Find out what's wrong with your email list. 100% Free.
products.summaryZh: 找出你的邮件列表中的问题。完全免费。
products.descriptionZh: 立即免费发现邮件列表中的隐藏问题。支持多达10万个地址——完全在浏览器中运行，无需发送任何数据至服务器。专为关注送达率和发件人声誉的邮件营销人员打造。立即使用网站提供的示例数据进行尝试。
products.description: Uncover hidden problems in your email list — instantly and for free. Up to 100,000 addresses — runs entirely in your browser, nothing is sent to a server. Built for email marketers who care about deliverability and sender reputation. Try now with the sample data available on the site.

products.name: TubeMailer
products.tagline: Find & export YouTube creator emails in bulk
products.summaryZh: 批量查找并导出YouTube创作者邮箱
products.descriptionZh: TubeMailer 是一款 Chrome 扩展程序，可批量查找 YouTube 频道背后的商务邮箱。搜索特定领域后，它会从频道“关于”页面提取邮箱，若 YouTube 上未提供邮箱则追踪创作者关联网站，最后将整理好的列表导出为 CSV、Excel 或 JSON 格式。无需 API 密钥，无按联系人计费，也无按次“解锁”限制。它在用户自己的浏览器中运行，每天最多处理 1000 封邮箱，并可免费开始使用。专为进行创作者拓展的机构、赞助商和营销人员打造。
products.description: TubeMailer is a Chrome extension that finds the business emails behind YouTube channels — in bulk. Search a niche, and it pulls emails from channel About pages, follows creators' linked sites when there's no email on YouTube, then exports clean lists to CSV, Excel, or JSON. No API keys. No per-contact fees. No metered "unlocks." It runs in your own browser, handles up to 1,000 emails/day, and starts for free. Built for agencies, sponsors, and marketers doing creator outreach.

products.name: Salestrics AI-Native Email Beta
products.tagline: Stop paying the SaaS tax. One database. Zero fragmentation.
products.summaryZh: 停止支付SaaS税。一个数据库。零碎片化。
products.descriptionZh: Salestrics AI原生邮件正式上线！我们彻底重构了原有的基础邮件线程，打造了企业级通信引擎。作为实时营收工作空间（整合CRM、服务台、视频通话及文档/云盘套件）的扩展，本次更新新增Threadmail™（通过自定义域名/BYOD为每条记录创建独立收件箱）、服务端Google同步，以及数据库原生AI功能，可实现零盲区摘要、起草和改写。30天试用期+6个月五折优惠！
products.description: Salestrics AI-Native Email is live! We ripped out our old, bare-bones email threads and rebuilt an enterprise communication engine. As an expansion of our live revenue workspace—which unifies CRM, Service Desk, video calling, and a Docs/Drive suite—this update adds Threadmail™ (isolated inboxes for every record via custom domains/BYOD), server-side Google Sync, and database-native AI to Summarize, Draft, and Rewrite with zero blind spots. 30-day trial + 50% off for 6 months!

products.name: digitvest.com
products.tagline: Starter SaaS websites built for founders
products.summaryZh: 为创始人打造的SaaS入门级网站
products.descriptionZh: Digitvest 是一个精选销售页面，提供现成的SaaS网站、Web应用和AI驱动的数字资产。每个项目都已构建、打包并准备转让，让创始人、独立开发者及运营者能够跳过早期搭建阶段，直接以现有产品为基础起步。其核心是提供简单、可用的入门级项目，这些项目可被改进、推广、变现，或作为新业务的起点。
products.description: Digitvest is a curated sales page for ready-made SaaS websites, web apps, and AI-powered digital assets. Each project is built, packaged, and prepared for transfer, so founders, indie hackers, and operators can skip the early setup phase and start with an existing product foundation. The focus is on simple, usable starter projects that can be improved, marketed, monetized, or used as a base for a new business.

products.name: Lysterly
products.tagline: The smarter, quicker, simpler Etsy Tool
products.summaryZh: 更智能、更快捷、更简单的Etsy工具
products.descriptionZh: Lysterly 利用您的产品和店铺详情，撰写符合 Etsy 规范的标题和描述，并附带 13 个长尾标签以优化 SEO。节省数小时时间，同时保留您的语气和个人风格，再添加到 Etsy。
products.description: Lysterly uses your product and store details to write a draft Etsy compliant title and descriptions with 13 long tail tags to enhance your SEO. Save hours of time and still put your tone of voice and personal touches before adding to Etsy.

products.name: WP Triage
products.tagline: Get alerted to vulnerable WordPress sites before they break
products.summaryZh: 在WordPress网站出现故障前，及时收到漏洞预警。
products.descriptionZh: WP Triage 可连接您的 WordPress 站点，持续检查插件、主题及核心是否存在已知漏洞数据。无需在数十个仪表盘间翻找，您将获得一份清晰的风险排查清单。系统按风险等级为每个站点评分，让您始终明确优先修复项。警报功能助您在问题演变为事故前及时应对。
products.description: WP Triage connects to your WordPress sites and continuously checks plugins, themes, and core against known vulnerability data. Instead of digging through dozens of dashboards, you get one clear triage list. It scores each site by risk so you always know what to fix first. Alerts let you act before a problem becomes an incident.

products.name: AI Secretary (Telegram Bot)
products.tagline: Your personal AI secretary inside Telegram — notes reminders
products.summaryZh: Telegram 里的个人 AI 秘书 — 笔记与提醒
products.descriptionZh:
AI Secretary 是一款 Telegram 原生助手，无需额外安装应用，即可帮你记录笔记、整理信息并获取提醒。像日常聊天一样给机器人发消息，它就能将你的输入转化为结构化操作。  
笔记与记忆：随时保存聊天中的重要信息和灵感。  
自然语言提醒：输入“明天9点提醒我”，即可自动触发。  
多智能体模式：根据工作流程启用特定AI角色（如营销、财务、法律）。
products.description: AI Secretary is a Telegram-native assistant that helps you capture notes, organize information, and get reminders without installing yet another app. Just message the bot like you normally chat — and it turns your input into structured actions Notes & memory: save important info from chats and ideas on the go Natural-language reminders: “remind me tomorrow at 9” → delivered automatically Multi-agent mode: enable specialized AI roles (e.g., marketing, finance, legal) depending on your workflow

products.name: Pulse Fitness Club
products.tagline: The AI-powered social network & tracking hub for athletes.
products.summaryZh: 面向运动员的AI驱动社交网络与追踪中心。
products.descriptionZh: 通过WhatsApp式聊天与运动员互动，使用实时AI追踪记录训练，借助AI卡路里追踪器即时计算宏量营养目标，通过GPS绘制户外路线，并在全球排行榜上竞技。终极暗色主题运动生态系统。
products.description: Connect with athletes via WhatsApp-style chat, log workouts with live AI tracking, count macro goals instantly via an AI calorie tracker, map outdoor routes with GPS, and compete on the global leaderboard. The ultimate dark-themed athletic ecosystem.

products.name: LinkingMem - v0.3.0
products.tagline: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine
products.summaryZh: LinkingMem — 图原生RAG引擎
products.descriptionZh: 高性能Rust+Python引擎，专为基于图的RAG设计，将向量搜索、图遍历与LLM推理统一于单一系统。查询→嵌入→HNSW检索→图扩展（BFS）→排序→LLM回答。LinkingMem将向量搜索与图遍历整合于紧密耦合的流水线中，实现快速多跳推理、高效内存使用及生产级可扩展性。
products.description: A high-performance Rust + Python engine for graph-based RAG, unifying vector search, graph traversal, and LLM reasoning in a single system. Query → Embedding → HNSW retrieval → Graph expansion (BFS) → Ranking → LLM answer LinkingMem combines vector search and graph traversal in one tightly integrated pipeline, enabling fast multi-hop reasoning, efficient memory usage, and production-ready scalability.

products.name: Mozy: Walk to Unlock Apps
products.tagline: 🌱 Walk More. Scroll Less. Unlock Apps with Movement.
products.summaryZh: 🌱 多走几步，少刷几下。动起来，解锁应用。
products.descriptionZh: Mozy 通过将身体活动转化为屏幕使用时间，帮助你打破刷屏习惯。走路，赚取屏幕时间，解锁应用。不走路？无法刷屏。Mozy 是一款独特的应用拦截器和计步器，它奖励运动而非惩罚手机使用。你走的每一步都能赚取屏幕时间，可用于你喜爱的应用。一旦赚取的时间用完，Mozy 会阻止访问，直到你再次活动起来。
products.description: Mozy helps you break the scrolling habit by turning your physical activity into screen time. Walk. Earn screen time. Unlock apps. No walking? No scrolling. Mozy is a unique app blocker and step counter that rewards movement instead of punishing phone use. Every step you take earns screen time minutes that can be used on your favorite apps. Once your earned time runs out, Mozy blocks access until you get moving again.

products.name: Paste Switch
products.tagline: Paste and switch recent clips in place
products.summaryZh: 粘贴并原地切换最近剪贴内容
products.descriptionZh: Paste Switch 是一款 Mac 剪贴板工具，将重复粘贴工作转化为速度优势：粘贴最新内容，再次按下同一快捷键即可原地切换，当别人还在打开历史记录时，你已继续输入。
products.description: Paste Switch is a Mac clipboard tool that turns repeated paste work into a speed advantage: paste the latest clip, press the same shortcut again to switch in place, and keep typing while others are still opening history.

products.name: Nixflow
products.tagline: Automate anything — describe it, Nixflow ships it.
products.summaryZh: 自动化一切——只需描述，Nixflow 即刻交付。
products.descriptionZh: Nixflow 是一款原生AI工作流自动化平台（iPaaS）。用自然语言描述需求，AI即可构建工作流——通过REST、webhooks或内置节点连接任意应用。成本随规模扩展保持可预测。内置AI助手、智能体与顾问，配备RAG知识库。支持多公司管理，适用于代理机构。采用AES-256加密，按组织隔离。永久免费计划——无需信用卡。比Zapier、n8n和Make更简单、更实惠的替代方案。
products.description: Nixflow is an AI-native workflow automation platform (iPaaS). Describe what you want in plain English and let AI build the flow — then connect any app via REST, webhooks, or built-in nodes. Unlike costs stay predictable as you scale. Built-in AI Assistant, Agent & Consultant with a RAG knowledge base. Multi-company management for agencies. AES-256 encryption, per-org isolation. Free forever plan — no credit card. A simpler, more affordable alternative to Zapier, n8n & Make.

products.name: LimitBar
products.tagline: macOS menu bar app showing your Claude usage limits
products.summaryZh: macOS 菜单栏应用，显示您的 Claude 使用限制
products.descriptionZh: 如果你正在重度使用 Claude Code（尤其是搭配 Fable 时），使用限制就是你的工作预算。LimitBar 将所有限制数据保留在 Mac 菜单栏中，每 60 秒更新一次，让你可以规划一天的工作，而无需反复运行 /usage 或点击使用量图标。原生 Swift 编写，体积小于 1 MB，不使用 Electron。读取的数据与 Claude 显示的一致，且不消耗任何 token。非官方产品，与 Anthropic 无关。售价 2.99 欧元，包含源代码。
products.description: If you're powerusing Claude Code (esp. with Fable), the usage limits are your work budget. LimitBar keeps all of them in your Mac menu bar, updated every 60s, so you can plan your day instead of re-running /usage or clicking the usage wheel all the time. Native Swift, under 1 MB, no Electron. Reads the same numbers Claude shows you and spends zero tokens doing it. Unofficial, not an Anthropic product. €2.99, source included.
